query:
SELECT id, headline, featuredImage, createdAt 
FROM articles 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mfUemcUDe4dZgvy.root --database 5aXJgJ23doBv7KCYS3YtvX --execute SELECT id, headline, featuredImage, createdAt 
FROM articles 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC 
LIMIT 20;
